/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG --coverage -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/utcommon.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/utcommon.dir/test_vector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/utcommon.dir/test_config_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/utcommon.dir/test_scene_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/utcommon.dir/test_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/utcommon.dir/test_camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/utcommon.dir/test_random.cpp.o CMakeFiles/utcommon.dir/test_ppm_writer.cpp.o -o utcommon  ../common/libcommon.a ../lib/libgtest_main.a ../lib/libgtest.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtbb.so.12.11
